description: End-to-end RNA velocity pipeline in one command, wrapping the upstream rna_velocity_workflow.run_velocity_analysis: preprocess -> velocity -> velocity_graph -> latent time (dynamical) -> velocity_confidence -> velocity_pseudotime -> rank_velocity_genes -> figures, writing adata_velocity.h5ad plus the figure set under record_store.
rules: read-only input — writes adata_velocity.h5ad and figures under record_store
input must have layers['spliced'] and layers['unspliced'] plus a UMAP and the GROUPBY clusters
latent time + driver genes are produced only when MODE=dynamical and the GROUPBY column exists
defaults follow the upstream skill: groupby=clusters, n_top_genes=2000, n_neighbors=30, mode=dynamical, n_jobs=4
usage: Set INPUT (.h5ad with spliced/unspliced + UMAP + clusters). Optional: GROUPBY, N_TOP_GENES, N_NEIGHBORS, MODE, N_JOBS. Output: adata_velocity.h5ad + figures.
limitation: Requires scvelo (and scanpy) installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder adata_velocity.h5ad and still passes. Dynamical mode is slow (~10-30 min for 10K cells).
